user.title: Configure Homebridge Monitor
user.description: Enter the host (IP address or hostname) and port of your Homebridge instance.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Homebridge instance (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
data_description.port: TCP port on which the Homebridge web UI is listening (default: 8581)

abort.already_configured: This Homebridge instance is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Homebridge. Verify the host and port and try again.

init.title: Homebridge Monitor options
init.description: Adjust the polling interval for the connectivity check.

data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) Home Assistant will check if Homebridge is reachable (5 – 3600)
